cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are less than 8 years old and weigh less than 12 kg. First, the header is name, age, height (cm), weight (kg). Then each line is a penguin. Let me parse each one: 1. Louis: age 7, height 50 cm, weight 11 kg. 2. The question is looking for penguins that meet two conditions: less than 8 years old AND less than 12 kg in weight. Let me check each one. Starting with Louis. His age is 7, which is less than 8. His weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12. So Louis meets both conditions. That's one. Next, Bernard. Age is 5, which is under 8. His weight is 13 kg. Oh, that's more than 12, so he doesn't meet the weight condition. So Bernard is out. Vincent is 9 years old. Wait, 9 is more than 8, so he doesn't meet the age condition. Even though his weight is 11 kg, which is under 12, the age disqualifies him. So Vincent doesn't count. Gwen is 8 years old. The condition is less than 8, so 8 is not less than 8. So her age doesn't meet the requirement. Her weight is 15 kg, which is way over 12. So Gwen doesn't meet either condition. So only Louis meets both conditions.
